From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[NSW](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/NSW "wiktionary:NSW")***, ***[New South Wales](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/New_South_Wales "wiktionary:New South Wales")***, or ***[nsw](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/nsw "wiktionary:nsw")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**NSW** is a short form name for [New South Wales](/wiki/New_South_Wales "New South Wales"), an Australian state.

**NSW** may also refer to:

* [King of Egypt](/wiki/King_of_Egypt "King of Egypt")
* [National Herbarium of New South Wales](/wiki/National_Herbarium_of_New_South_Wales "National Herbarium of New South Wales"), by Index Herbariorum code
* [Naval Strike Wing](/wiki/Naval_Strike_Wing "Naval Strike Wing") of the UK's Royal Navy Fleet Air Arm
* [Navut language](/wiki/Navut_language "Navut language") of Vanuatu
* [Newman–Shanks–Williams prime](/wiki/Newman%E2%80%93Shanks%E2%80%93Williams_prime "Newman–Shanks–Williams prime"), a class of number in mathematics
* [Nintendo Switch](/wiki/Nintendo_Switch "Nintendo Switch"), a hybrid (home and handheld) video gaming console
* [United States Naval Special Warfare Command](/wiki/United_States_Naval_Special_Warfare_Command "United States Naval Special Warfare Command"), a military commando force
* *[National Socialist World](/wiki/National_Socialist_World "National Socialist World")*, defunct neo-Nazi magazine
